required_preferences.fact: Handles all aspects of her cat's medication and daily fluid regimen herself, with no delegation, during her partner’s extended absence abroad

supersedes.fact: Handles her cat’s medication personally when both partners are home; delegates to her partner during his travel periods abroad

required_preferences.fact: Always does pre-swim stretching routines to prevent wrist flare-ups before pool workouts

supersedes.fact: Always does pre-run stretching routines to prevent wrist flare-ups before outdoor runs

required_preferences.fact: Preps quick, single-portion meals in bulk for the week to minimize daily cooking and cleaning while managing solo household and pet duties.
No longer schedules any late-night work sessions or after-hours deployments; commits to strict evening boundaries to sustain energy for the expanded team leadership role.
Researches bilingual parenting blogs and forums to gather and share relevant resources with her sister
Books physical therapy appointments on Friday evenings, never reschedules them for work obligations

persona: A mid-career backend developer at a fintech startup
